config.plugin.name: pgoutput
config.slot.name: outbox_slot
config.publication.name: outbox_pub
config._comment_capture: Log-based CDC only (D8): Debezium reads the PG WAL. NO polling of the outbox table, NO published=true UPDATE. The outbox is append-only + time-partitioned; cleanup is DROP PARTITION.
config._comment_routing: The outbox EventRouter SMT turns each outbox row into a Kafka record on the topic named by the row's `topic` column, keyed by the aggregate id (D5 keys topics by aggregate_id alone). The 02 §4.3 envelope is already the row payload, so it is forwarded whole.
config._comment_delivery: acks=all + exactly-once source semantics; at-least-once to consumers, which dedupe via the inbox (exactly-once effect, 01 §3).
